filesystem.description: Scoped read/write access to the AUCTUS project directory only. Never grants access above the project root.

fetch.description: HTTP fetch for public market data, company profiles, and financial news. Public data only — never transmit client deal data.

sqlite.description: Local SQLite database for trading comps and precedent transaction data. Stored entirely on-premises.

brave-search.description: Web search for market research, competitor discovery, and sector news during Competitor Analysis workflow.

factset.description: FactSet MCP server — authorised for PUBLIC market data only: entity financials, trading multiples, precedent transactions, and industry benchmarks. Never transmit confidential deal data through this connector.

_metadata.project: AUCTUS Capital Partners AG — Agentic PE Platform
_metadata.security_note: All credentials injected via environment variables. See .env.example. Never hardcode secrets.
_metadata.mcp_data_policy: The factset connector is authorised for PUBLIC market data retrieval only. Confidential AUCTUS deal inputs (IM files, management projections, client names) must never be passed to the factset MCP endpoint.
